title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is a framework that automates AI coding workflows triggered from multiple platforms including GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira. Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter that automatically fixes bugs and opens pull requests based on ticket inputs, with each ticket maintaining a dedicated conversation context.
